name: Steel City Securities Limited
summary: Steel City Securities Limited provides retail stock broking services in southern parts of India. It provides a trading platform of capital market, futures and options, commodities, and currency derivatives; acts as a depository participant; offers margin trading facility for stocks or derivatives traded on National Stock Exchange of India Limited and BSE; and distributes mutual funds, credit cards, corporate fixed deposits, bonds, and IPOs. The company also promotes pension schemes for the retirement benefits of employees and business people; offers insurance agency services; and provides non-banking financial services, such as personal loans, gold loans, and loans against securities. In addition, it offers e-governance products, such as PAN, TAN, e-TDS, AIR, and form 24G, as well as change requests of PAN and TAN. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Visakhapatnam, India.
